SkillDetail.powerDescription: {title} helps your agent handle specialized tasks with structured reasoning, reliable execution, and protected delivery through MCP.
SkillDetail.featureOneDescription: Analyze trends and identify high-signal patterns from complex inputs.
SkillDetail.featureTwoDescription: Surface unusual signals and potential issues before they become expensive.
SkillDetail.setupDescription: Connect the skill to your agent environment with the steps below.
SkillDetail.protectedDescription: The complete SKILL.md is delivered only through authenticated OceanSkill MCP calls. Public pages expose evaluation metadata, never protected instructions.
SkillDetail.addToLibraryHint: Save this platform skill to your dashboard and make it available through MCP.
SkillDetail.stepOne: Sign in and create an MCP key
SkillDetail.stepTwo: Add OceanSkill MCP to your client
SkillDetail.stepThree: Invoke the protected skill when needed
SkillDetail.compatibilityDescription: This release has been reviewed for the clients listed below.
SkillDetail.faqOneQuestion: Does this skill work with GPT-4 and Claude Opus?
SkillDetail.faqOneAnswer: Yes. The skill is delivered through MCP and can be used by compatible agent clients that support authenticated tool calls.
SkillDetail.faqTwoQuestion: Is my data sent to the skill owner?
SkillDetail.faqTwoAnswer: No protected content is exposed publicly. Usage is mediated through OceanSkill and scoped to authenticated MCP requests.
SkillDetail.faqThreeAnswer: Supported input types depend on the skill implementation and compatible client. Check the MCP response metadata for exact constraints.
SkillDetail.reviewOne: The skill fits neatly into our data workflow. Detection quality is strong and setup through MCP was straightforward.
SkillDetail.reviewTwo: Useful, fast, and reliable. It helped our agent classify repetitive analysis work with much less manual cleanup.
SkillDetail.noRelated: No other active skills are published in this category yet.
